label: Platinum
description: Exceptional sites with infrastructure in place, favorable zoning, and demonstrated market demand. Development-ready with minimal barriers.

label: Gold
description: High-quality sites with strong fundamentals and clear pathways to development. Minor preparatory steps remain before shovel-ready status.

label: Silver
description: Solid opportunities with good market positioning. Some infrastructure or entitlement work needed to reach full development readiness.

label: Bronze
description: Emerging sites with strong long-term potential. Requires foundational work on utilities, zoning, or access before development begins.

label: Emerging
description: Emerging sites with strong long-term potential. Requires foundational work on utilities, zoning, or access before development begins.
